title: Bare Bones Better Better Leaves
description: Just a regular Bare Bones Better Leaves addon, with Bare Bones style shading
body:
Just thought I'd make something different since any Better Leaves addon for Bare Bones I see all have flat colors, which I felt doesn't read well

![Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da86f191774388952daa19fec1bdaf015047eed7.png)

Check out the Bedrock port by Pochilito!!!
https://mcpedl.com/barebones-leafierleaves/
